function.message: I can’t complete this yet because there are no bills in `50_finance/purchases/` (or elsewhere in `50_finance/`) that are identifiable as related to Foundry. Please point me to the specific bill file(s) to OCR, or provide the matching project/vendor naming used for Foundry expenses.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow (lowest filename), read required system workflows/schema before OCR work, resolved identity via canonical cast record, and did not mutate workspace when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requests OCR of bills related to Foundry, but canonical identity in `10_entities/cast/foundry.md` provides no finance linkage, and searches found zero `foundry` matches in `50_finance/`. Per root and workflow rules, missing required canonical evidence must not be guessed.
